creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text: I've also been running the patch (from http://...) for 1-2 weeks now on a couple stable/10 boxes and one -CURRENT, ranging from 4 to 16 gig of RAM.  No problems noted, swapping definitely less aggressive so I've not yet waited for anything to swap back in.  Doesn't seem to starve the ARC either.
